Test Description: Checks reset/default register values and verifies masked write-read behavior for GPIO GP0 GPIO_8..GPIO_39 and related GPIO group registers as listed in test_define.c.
Remarks: SKIPPING VRRW registers as per skip_array; When reading default values the DIN value becomes 1 automatically if no force is applied; forcing DIN to 0 makes bit-level select high causing read not to match expected (comment in test_define.c).
